arts.ttl: Chesterfield keep play-off hopes alive after late draw with Bradford

arts.sum: Both sides are looking to gain promotion from League Two with just three games remaining. Chesterfield are vying for the final playoff spot while Bradford are currently in the automatic promotion plac...

arts.ttl: The lowdown on AFC Wimbledon 0 Chesterfield 0 - Dons move point closer to securing play-offs but must win Monday to keep automatic hopes alive
arts.sum: Neither side had a real clear-cut effort on goal in the second half, with Alistair Smith testing Boot from distance in the 83rd minute a chance of note. Bugiel thought he had given Jackson’s side the lead just before half-time when he met a header inside the area, but his effort stung the palms of Boot and Smith was unable to apply the finish on the rebound.

arts.ttl: Preview: Chesterfield vs. Bradford City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League Two clash between Chesterfield and Bradford City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
